statement: An agent can run end-to-end experiment workflows against production code paths and diagnose issues from telemetry queries, with selective mocks remaining for deterministic CI.
rationale: Production APIs and orchestrator tests already exist, but full automated loop still has export and deterministic testing gaps.
keyAssumptions: Export path for analysis is completed or substituted.
validationCriteria: Agent runbook can execute start->wait->trace->classify->replay on real flows.
critiquePoints: Live-provider tests remain expensive and env-gated.
questions: What percentage of CI should stay mocked vs live?
